name: blocked-security-skill
description: Demonstrates a blocked skill with malicious prompt-injection content. Use when showing how publisher security stops unsafe skills.

repo_signals.error: <urlopen error [Errno 8] nodename nor servname provided, or not known>

notes: Metadata values are extracted from SKILL.md inside the skill folder.
Token estimate is calculated automatically from the skill content.
Word count is a publisher-side field and is not part of the server contract.
